open_items: [Care] care_alternatives_considered: alternatives listed without a documented rationale, or fewer than the configured minimum
Advisor/compliance to remediate the items above before principal adjudication.
disclaimer: Reg BI and suitability evidence review only; not a best-interest determination, a suitability approval, or supervisory sign-off. No recommendation has been approved and no order has been placed. A qualified supervisor or principal must adjudicate.
narrative: This review assembles the Reg BI evidence for a retail rollover recommendation on account ****4021 (roll $180,000 from a 401(k) to a rollover IRA, allocating to the Balanced Allocation Fund). Twelve obligation checks were evaluated across Disclosure, Care, Conflict of Interest, and Compliance. Eleven are satisfied with cited evidence; one Care gap was identified — reasonably-available alternatives were not documented with a rationale. Review disposition: Gaps-identified. Before this packet goes to a principal, the advisor should document the alternatives considered and their relative costs. Scope: this review reports the evidence supporting each obligation and flags gaps. It is not a best-interest determination and confers no approval; the recommendation is neither approved nor rejected here, and no order is placed. A qualified supervisor or principal must adjudicate.
